x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: KB volume is the primary training corpus for Now Assist AI Search and article summarization. Too few articles limits AI deflection coverage and reduces the breadth of self-service answers the AI can generate.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Increase KB article volume by migrating knowledge from existing sources. Target: 100+ published active articles before Now Assist enablement. Prioritize high-volume incident categories for maximum AI deflection coverage.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_bef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[KB volume is the primary training corpus for Now Assist AI Search and article summarization. Too few articles limits AI deflection coverage and reduces the breadth of self-service answers the AI can generate.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Active KB Article Count</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 100) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Sufficient content for Now Assist AI Search and knowledge-based deflection.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 100+). Now Assist AI Search deflection coverage will be limited — expand KB content for top incident categories.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient content for meaningful Now Assist AI Search and knowledge deflection.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000315</number><order>10</order><remediation_guidance>Increase KB article volume by migrating knowledge from existing sources. Target: 100+ published active articles before Now Assist enablement. Prioritize high-volume incident categories for maximum AI deflection coverage.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>bef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Active KB Article Count</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_bef8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c3f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
